attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

const isPlaySequentially = platePositions.length < Game_Define.MAX_SCATTER;\\n            let isPlayUpgradeEffectFinish = !data || data.length === 0;\\n\\n            // 判斷是否有升級資料並決定插入位置（隨機）\\n /**\\n     * @ch 播放升級效果\\n     * @param data 資料\\n     * @param callback 完成回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayUpgradeEffect(data: IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo, callback?: () => void): Promise<void> {\\n this.InvokeSafeCallback(callback, \\\"PlayUpgradeEffect\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 停止所有動畫並清理資源\\n     */\\n    private StopAllAnimations(): void {\\n        // 停止所有 Tween\\n this.InvokeSafeCallback(callback, \\\"PlayUpgradeEffect\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 停止所有動畫並清理資源\\n     */\\n    private StopAllAnimations(): void {\\n        // 停止所有 Tween\\n The user is showing me a tool execution from the primary session. Let me analyze what happened:

**What happened**: An Edit operation was performed
**File**: `MagicPotController.ts` 
**Change**: Changed `interface IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo` to `export interface IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo`
**Context**: This is part of consolidating duplicate interface definitions - making the interface in MagicPotController exportable so SlotReels can import it instead of having its own duplicate definition.

This is a refactor to eliminate code duplication (DRY principle violation). The interface `IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo` was defined in both MagicPotController.ts and SlotReels.ts. The decision was to make MagicPotController the single source of truth since it owns the magic pot domain and events.

Let me create an observation for this:

**Type**: refactor (code restructured to eliminate duplication)
**Title**: Export IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo from MagicPotController
**Subtitle**: Made interface exportable to enable import by SlotReels, eliminating duplicate definition
**Facts**:
- IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo interface in MagicPotController.ts changed from private to exported
- Interface was previously defined in both MagicPotController.ts:11 and SlotReels.ts:13
- MagicPotController designated as single source of truth for magic pot type definitions
- Interface defines Upgrade (boolean) and EnergyLevel (number) properties for magic jar protocol

**Narrative**: Exported the IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo interface from MagicPotController.ts to eliminate duplicate definitions across the codebase. Previously, the same interface was defined locally in both MagicPotController.ts and SlotReels.ts without export statements, violating the DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself) principle. 

MagicPotController owns the event definitions that rely on this interface as their parameter contract, making it the logical owner of the type definition. SlotReels can now import the interface directly rather than maintaining a redundant copy, ensuring consistency and centralizing maintenance.

**Concepts**: 
- what-changed (interface visibility changed from private to exported)
- pattern (single source of truth for shared types)
- problem-solution (duplicate definitions resolved by export/import)

**Files modified**: MagicPotController.ts

}\\n\\n    // ==================== 聽牌系統方法 ====================\\n    \\n    /**\\n     * @ch Collect 聽牌系統\\n     * 檢查第一輪和第六輪是否剛停止，如果有 Collect 符號則觸發聽牌效果\\n     * @param col 當前列索引\\n     */\\n   }\\n        }\\n        \\n        // 如果第一輪有 Collect 符號，觸發聽牌效果事件（展開第一輪的背景）\\n        if (hasCollect) {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(REEL_UI_EVENT.SHOW_LIGHT_LEFT_REEL);  // 第一輪亮燈（展開背景）\\n const nextCol = col + 1;\\n        if (!this.CheckColIsStop(nextCol) && this.ShouldApplyTeaseToCol(nextCol)) {\\n            // 下一輪也是聽牌，套用視覺效果，震動繼續\\n            if (!this.m_teaseApplied[nextCol]) }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 套用聽牌特效（第3、4、5輪專用）\\n     * @param col 列索引\\n     */\\n    private ApplyTeaseSpecialEffects(col: number): void {\\n        if ( this.m_isClickStopBtn ) return;\\n\\n this.SetReelAcceleration(col, TEASE_REEL_ACCELERATION);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 啟動全畫面震動（如果尚未震動）\\n        if (!this.m_isShaking) {\\n            this.PlayShakeEffect();\\n {\\n            const cell = columnSymbol.GetSingleCell(row);\\n            if (!cell) continue;\\n            const symbolId = row < symbols.length ? symbols[row] : -1;\\n            const isCollect = symbolId === Game_Define.Symbol.Collect\\n                           || symbolId === Game_Define.Symbol.CollectAndRetrigger;\\n            cell.SetSymbolDark(!isCollect);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 重置螢幕放大效果\\n     * @param callback ZoomOut 動畫結束後的回調（有震動時等動畫結束才呼叫，無震動時立即呼叫）\\n     * @param isAllStop 是否全部停輪完成\\n     */\\n    private ResetCameraEffect(callback?: () => void, this.StopShakeEffect(callback, isAllStop);\\n            this.m_isShaking = false;\\n        } else {\\n            callback?.();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清理所有聽牌特效\\n     */\\n    private ClearAllTeaseEffects(): void {\\n        for (let col = 0; col < this.m_teaseEffectsActive.length; col++) {\\n            if (this.m_teaseEffectsActive[col]) {\\n                // log(`TODO: 清理第${col + 1}輪聽牌特效`);\\n                \\n                this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.PlayPreWinFrameOut(col);\\n                this.m_teaseEffectsActive[col] = false;\\n                this.m_teaseEffectNodes[col] = null;\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清理單一列的聽牌特效\\n     * @param col 列索引\\n     */\\n    private ClearAllTeaseEffectsByCol(col: number): this.m_teaseEffectsActive[col] = false;\\n            this.m_teaseEffectNodes[col] = null;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 計算聽牌額外轉輪圈數\\n     * @param col 列索引\\n     * @param startCol 聽牌開始列索引\\n     * @returns 額外轉輪圈數\\n     */\\n    private CalculateTeaseExtraTurns(col: number, startCol: number): number {\\n        // 檢查前面已停輪的列是否累積達到聽牌條件\\n        if (this.CheckTeaseConditionsForCol(col)) {\\n            // 🆕 特殊處理：FreeGame 聽牌時的最後一輪\\n            if (this.m_gameView.RoundInfo.NearMissKind === NearMissKind.FreeGame && \\n                col === Game_Define.LAST_COL) {\\n                \\n                // 往前找到最近一個沒被鎖住的輪\\n                for (let prevCol = col - 1; prevCol >= startCol; prevCol--) {\\n                    if (!this.m_lockColumn[prevCol]) {\\n                        // 找到了，使用相同的額外圈數（遞迴呼叫）\\n                        return this.CalculateTeaseExtraTurns(prevCol, startCol);\\n                    }\\n                }\\n                // 如果前面都被鎖住，使用基礎額外圈數\\n                return this.m_teaseExtraSpins;\\n            }\\n            \\n            // 原有邏輯：聽牌時增加額外轉輪圈數\\n            const baseExtraTurns = this.m_teaseExtraSpins; // 基礎額外圈數 (5圈)\\n            const colExtraTurns = (col - startCol) * this.m_teaseExtraSpins;\\n            return baseExtraTurns + colExtraTurns;\\n        }\\n        return 0;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 計算每一輪的停輪時間\\n     * @param col 列索引\\n     * @param timesOfSpin 轉輪圈數\\n     * @param lockCount 鎖定列數量\\n     * @returns 停輪時間\\n     */\\n    private CalculateReelStopTime(col: number, timesOfSpin: number, lockCount: number): number {\\n        const respinExtraBase = this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame ? this.m_respinExtraBaseSpin : 0;\\n        const respinExtraInterval = this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame ? this.m_respinExtraIntervalSpin : 0;\\n\\n        // 基礎停輪時間\\n        let baseStopTime = this.m_spinTime * (timesOfSpin + this.m_timesOfBaseSpin + respinExtraBase);\\n\\n        // 列間隔時間\\n        let intervalTime = (this.m_spinIntervalTimes + respinExtraInterval) * this.m_spinTime * (col - lockCount);\\n        \\n        // 聽牌效果\\n        let teaseTime = 0;\\n        if (this.CheckTeaseConditionsForCol(col)) {\\n            const teaseExtraTurns = this.CalculateTeaseExtraTurns(col, this.m_gameView.RoundInfo.NearMissStartCol);\\n > lastReelStopTime) {\\n                    lastReelStopTime = this.m_reelStopTime[col];\\n                }\\n            }\\n            \\n            // StopTime = 最後一輪停輪時間 + 緩衝時間\\n            // 這樣確保所有輪都停下來後，再等待一小段緩衝時間就結束\\n            this.StopTime = this.ToolsStrip(\\n                lastReelStopTime + this.m_spinBufferTime01 + this.m_spinBufferTime02\\n            );\\n\\n            // 0：上假盤最上面 N 格、下假盤最下面 N 格受影響\\n     */\\n    private SetOtherPlateSymbolShow(isShow: boolean, affectedCount: number = -1)\\n    {\\n        for (let column = 0; column < Game_Define.COL; ++column) {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < SHOW_COLUMNS; ++i) {\\n                if (i === Game_Define.MIDDLE_PLATE_INDEX) {\\n                    continue;\\n                }\\n                // 上假盤(i > MIDDLE) 從最上面(row 0) 往下算 → 從上方起算\\n                // 下假盤(i < MIDDLE) 從最下面(row N-1) 往上算 → 從下方起算\\n                const affectFromBottom = i < Game_Define.MIDDLE_PLATE_INDEX;\\n   // this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.ReturnAll();\\n        for ( let col = 0; col < Game_Define.COL; ++col )\\n        {\\n            const columnSymbol = this.AllColumns[ Game_Define.MIDDLE_PLATE_INDEX             sourceSingleCell.Label.color = Game_Define.Color.Dark;\\n                }\\n                // 同步壓暗該格的 symbol 圖\\n                sourceSingleCell?.SetSymbolDark( true );\\n =\\n                ( toNodeCol === 0 ) ? }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定當前假轉輪帶 Seed（透過 GENERATE_FAKE_REEL_SEED 事件委派 FakeReelManager）\\n     * @param fileIndex 由呼叫者決定的檔案索引；建議透過 ResolveFakeReelFileIndex 取得\\n     * @param source 資料來源標記（'unshow' string = 'unknown') {\\n        const betMode = this.m_gameView.GetFakeReelBetMode();\\n\\n        // 既有 seed 的 betMode/fileIndex 跟新請求一致 → 沿用，避免重設 startPositions 造成跨 seed 取值不連續\\n        // 跨手 spin 或同 this.m_nowFakeReelSeed = seed;\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 獲取假轉輪帶隨機符號\\n     * @param reelIndex 轉輪索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.REEL-1)\\n     * @param count 要取得的符號數量 (正數=加，負數=自動計算)\\n     * @returns eventManager.Dispatch(FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_FAKE_REEL_SYMBOL_BY_SEED, this.m_nowFakeReelSeed, reelIndex, symbolCount, false, true, (result: SymbolInfo[]) => {\\n            symbols = result;\\n        });\\n\\n        // 更新假轉輪帶 Seed 位置，因為是往下轉\\n        this.ProcessFakeReelSeedPosition( reelIndex, -symbolCount );\\n\\n        // 把金額乘上目前的Bet再除以100\\n        const bet = }\\n        });\\n\\n        const reelMode = this.m_reelSymbolModes[ reelIndex ] ?? col < Game_Define.COL; col++ )\\n        {\\n            // 鎖定列不驗證\\n            if (this.m_lockColumn[ col ]) {\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            const targetCount = this.GetTargetSymbolCount( col );\\n            const actualUpper = this.m_allColumns[ UPPER_PLATE ]?.[ col ]?.Symbols ?? [];\\n            const actualLower = this.m_allColumns[ LOWER_PLATE ]?.[ col ]?.Symbols ?? [];\\n\\n            // 上假盤面驗證\\n            const upperServerCol = upperData?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n            if ( upperServerCol )\\n            {\\n                const serverCount = upperServerCol.length;\\n                let allMatch = true;\\n                const details: string[] = [];\\n                for ( let i = 0; i < targetCount; i++ )\\n                {\\n                    const actual = actualUpper[ i ] ?? '?';\\n                    if ( i === 0 && serverCount < targetCount )\\n                    {\\n                        // fake 補齊槽\\n                        details.push( `[0]:fake(${actual})` );\\n                    }\\n                    else\\n                    {\\n                        const serverIdx = serverCount < targetCount ? i - 1 : i;\\n                        const expected = upperServerCol[ serverIdx ]?.Symbol ?? '?';\\n                        const match = actual === expected;\\n                        if ( !match ) allMatch = false;\\n                        if ( isShowLog )\\n                        {\\n                            details.push( `[${i}]:${match ? '✅' : '❌'}(exp:${expected} act:${actual})` );\\n                        }\\n                    }\\n                }\\n                if ( !allMatch ) overallMatch = false;\\n                if ( isShowLog )\\n                {\\n                    warn( `  col${col} 上假盤面 ${allMatch ? '✅全符合' : '❌有不符'}: ${details.join( ' ' )}` );\\n                }\\n            }\\n            else if ( isShowLog )\\n            {\\n                warn( `  col${col} 上假盤面: 無 FakePlateSymbolUpper 資料，實際=${JSON.stringify( actualUpper )}` );\\n            }\\n\\n            // 下假盤面驗證\\n            const lowerServerCol = lowerData?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n            if ( lowerServerCol )\\n            {\\n                const serverCount = lowerServerCol.length;\\n                let allMatch = true;\\n                const details: string[] = [];\\n                for ( let i = 0; i < targetCount; i++ )\\n                {\\n                    const actual = actualLower[ i ] ?? '?';\\n                    if ( i === serverCount && serverCount < targetCount )\\n                    {\\n                        // fake 補齊槽\\n                        details.push( `[${i}]:fake(${actual})` );\\n                    }\\n                    else if ( i < serverCount )\\n                    {\\n                        const expected = lowerServerCol[ i ]?.Symbol ?? '?';\\n                        const match = actual === expected;\\n                        if ( !match ) allMatch = false;\\n                        if ( isShowLog )\\n                        {\\n                            details.push( `[${i}]:${match ? '✅' : '❌'}(exp:${expected} act:${actual})` );\\n                        }\\n                    }\\n                }\\n                if ( !allMatch ) overallMatch = false;\\n                if ( isShowLog )\\n                {\\n                    warn( `  col${col} 下假盤面 ${allMatch ? '✅全符合' : '❌有不符'}: ${details.join( ' ' )}` );\\n                }\\n            }\\n            else if ( isShowLog )\\n            {\\n                warn( `  col${col} 下假盤面: 無 FakePlateSymbolLower 資料，實際=${JSON.stringify( actualLower )}` );\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        return overallMatch;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依照補齊規則，將 FakePlateSymbolUpper/Lower 資料轉換為 SymbolInfo[]\\n     * @param col 列索引\\n     * @param isUpper true = 上假盤面；false = 下假盤面\\n     * @param data RoundInfo.FakePlateSymbolUpper 或 FakePlateSymbolLower\\n     * @returns SymbolInfo[]，資料無效時回傳 null（呼叫端 fallback 隨機假符號）\\n     *\\n     * 補齊規則（僅 4 格 col 觸發，5 格 col 直接使用全部資料）：\\n     *   上假盤面：index 0 = fake；index 1-4 = 資料\\n     *   下假盤面：index 0-3 = 資料；index 4 = fake\\n     */\\n    private BuildFakePlateSymbolInfosFromData(\\n        col: number,\\n        isUpper: boolean,\\n        data: protocol.ar2es2Proto.ICColumn[] | null | undefined\\n    ): SymbolInfo[] | null\\n    {\\n        if ( !data || col >= data.length || !data[ col ]?.Col )\\n        {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const serverCol = data[ col ].Col;\\n        const targetCount = this.GetTargetSymbolCount( col );\\n        const serverCount = serverCol.length;\\n        const combined: protocol.ar2es2Proto.ICSymbol[] = [];\\n\\n        if ( serverCount >= targetCount )\\n        {\\n            // 5 格 col（0、5），直接使用\\n            for ( let i = 0; i < targetCount; i++ )\\n            {\\n                combined.push( serverCol[ i ] );\\n            }\\n        }\\n        else if ( isUpper )\\n        {\\n            // 上假盤面補齊：index 0 = fake，index 1-4 = 資料\\n            combined.push( this.GenerateFakeCSymbol( [], col ) );\\n            for ( let i = 0; i < serverCount; i++ )\\n            {\\n                combined.push( serverCol[ i ] );\\n            }\\n        }\\n        else\\n        {\\n            // 下假盤面補齊：index 0-3 = 資料，index 4 = fake\\n            for ( let i = 0; i < serverCount; i++ )\\n            {\\n                combined.push( serverCol[ i ] );\\n            }\\n            const existingSymbols = combined.map( cs => cs.Symbol ?? 0 );\\n            combined.push( this.GenerateFakeCSymbol( existingSymbols, col ) );\\n        }\\n\\n        return this.ConvertCSymbolsToSymbolInfos( combined, col );\\n    }\\n    //#endregion }\\n\\n    // ==================== 聽牌系統方法 ====================\\n    \\n    /**\\n     * @ch Collect 聽牌系統\\n     * 檢查第一輪和第六輪是否剛停止，如果有 Collect 符號則觸發聽牌效果\\n     * @param col 當前列索引\\n     */\\n }\\n\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 動態檢查並套用聽牌效果（在轉輪運行過程中），只檢查下一列\\n     */\\n    private CheckAndApplyTeaseEffectsByCol(col: number): void {\\n        if  /**\\n     * @ch 重置螢幕放大效果\\n     * @param callback ZoomOut 動畫結束後的回調（有震動時等動畫結束才呼叫，無震動時立即呼叫）\\n     * @param isAllStop 是否全部停輪完成\\n     */\\n    private ResetCameraEffect(callback?: () => void, this.StopShakeEffect(callback, isAllStop);\\n            this.m_isShaking = false;\\n        } else {\\n            callback?.();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清理所有聽牌特效\\n     */\\n             sourceSingleCell.Label.color = Game_Define.Color.Dark;\\n                }\\n                // 同步壓暗該格的 symbol 圖\\n                sourceSingleCell?.SetSymbolDark( true );\\n }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定當前假轉輪帶 Seed（透過 GENERATE_FAKE_REEL_SEED 事件委派 FakeReelManager）\\n     * @param fileIndex 由呼叫者決定的檔案索引；建議透過 ResolveFakeReelFileIndex 取得\\n     * @param source 資料來源標記（'unshow' '?';\\n                    if ( i === 0 && serverCount < targetCount )\\n                    {\\n                        // fake 補齊槽\\n                        details.push( `[0]:fake(${actual})` );\\n                    }\\n                    else\\n                    {\\n                        const serverIdx = serverCount < targetCount ? i - 1 : i;\\n                        const expected = upperServerCol[ serverIdx ]?.Symbol ?? 資料，實際=${JSON.stringify( actualLower )}` );\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        return overallMatch;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依照補齊規則，將 FakePlateSymbolUpper/Lower 資料轉換為 SymbolInfo[]\\n eventManager.Dispatch(REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.RESTORE_ZOOM, ZOOM_OUT_DURATION, callback);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 震動效果\\n\\n    //#region RespinGame\\n    /**\\n     *  @ch 播放RespinGame 該列的進入動畫\\n     *  @param col 列索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.COL-1)\\n     */\\n    private async PlayInAnimationInRespinGame(col: number) {\\n        const effectPlate = this.m_gameView.EffectPlate;\\n        if (effectPlate) {\\n            this.m_respinEnterPlayedCols[col] = true;\\n            effectPlate.SetFreeGameAddCashFrameShow(col, true);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     *  @ch 播放RespinGame 該列的退出動畫\\n     *  @param col 列索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.COL-1)\\n     */\\n    private async PlayOutAnimationInRespinGame(col: number) {\\n        const effectPlate = this.m_gameView.EffectPlate;\\n        if (effectPlate) {\\n            this.m_respinEnterPlayedCols[col] = false;\\n            effectPlate.SetFreeGameAddCashFrameShow(col, false);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     *  @ch 檢查並播放RespinGame 該列的動畫\\n     *  @param col 列索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.COL-1)\\n     */\\n    private async CheckAndPlayAnimationInRespinGame(col: number) {\\n        const newCol = col + 1;\\n        if (this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame) {\\n            // 前一列退出動畫（僅當該列本輪曾播過進入動畫時才播）\\n            if (col >= Game_Define.MIDDLE_COLS_START && col <= Game_Define.MIDDLE_COLS_END && this.m_respinEnterPlayedCols[col]) {\\n this.PlayInAnimationInRespinGame(newCol);\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     *  @ch 停止所有RespinGame 的動畫\\n     */\\n    private async StopAllRespinGameAnimation() {\\n        if (!this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        for (let col = Game_Define.MIDDLE_COLS_START; col <= Game_Define.MIDDLE_COLS_END; col++) {\\n            if (this.m_respinEnterPlayedCols[col]) {\\n                this.PlayOutAnimationInRespinGame(col);\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion RespinGame\\n\\n    // ==================== 變速轉輪 API ====================\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定指定輪的加速度（支援 NearMiss 聽牌降速）\\n     * @param col 目標轉輪索引 (0 ~ COL-1)\\n     * @param newAcc 新加速度（1.0 = 正常，0.25 = 降速至 1/4）\\n     */\\n    SetReelAcceleration( col: number, newAcc: number ): void\\n    {\\n        // BC-4：已進入停輪動畫的輪，忽略呼叫\\n        const stopLocal = this.m_reelStopLocalTime[ col ];\\n        if ( stopLocal === null ) return;\\n        if ( this.m_reelLocalTime[ col ] >= stopLocal ) return;\\n\\n        // EH guard：加速度不可為零（避免除以零）\\n        if ( newAcc <= 0 ) return;\\n\\n        const T = this.m_time;\\n\\n        // BC-5：更新加速度，建立工作陣列並計算本輪新的全局停輪時間\\n        this.m_reelAcceleration[ col ] = newAcc;\\n        const globalStop: number[] = this.m_reelStopTime.map( v => v ?? 0 );\\n        const remaining = stopLocal - this.m_reelLocalTime[ col ];\\n        globalStop[ col ] = this.ToolsStrip( T + remaining / newAcc );\\n        this.m_reelStopTime[ col ] = globalStop[ col ];  // 同步全局停輪時間（供 Spin_RealSpinMultiple 使用）\\n\\n        // BC-6 / BC-7：Cascade 調整後輪，確保停輪順序（支援推遲與拉回兩個方向）\\n        for ( let c = col + 1; c < Game_Define.COL; ++c )\\n        {\\n            const cStopLocal = this.m_reelStopLocalTime[ c ];\\n            if ( cStopLocal === null || this.m_reelLocalTime[ c ] >= cStopLocal ) break; // 已停輪\\n\\n            const spinTime = this.CalSpinTime( c, false );\\n            const respinExtraInterval = this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame ? this.m_respinExtraIntervalSpin : 0;\\n            const spinInterval = (this.m_spinIntervalTimes + respinExtraInterval) * spinTime;\\n            const minGlobalStop = globalStop[ c - 1 ] + spinInterval;\\n\\n            const minLocalTime = ( minGlobalStop - T ) * this.m_reelAcceleration[ c ] + this.m_reelLocalTime[ c ];\\n\\n            // 維持與上一輪的相對 local time 差距（含聽牌額外圈數）\\n            // 使用 globalStop[c-1]（BC-5 重算後的新值）換算到 reel c 的 local frame，避免讀到變速前的舊值\\n            const prevLocalStop = ( globalStop[ c - 1 ] - T ) * this.m_reelAcceleration[ c ] + this.m_reelLocalTime[ c ];\\n            const baseRelativeDiff = Math.max( 0, this.m_reelStopLocalTimeBase[ c ] - this.m_reelStopLocalTimeBase[ c - 1 ] );\\n            const relativeMinLocal = prevLocalStop + baseRelativeDiff;\\n            // relativeMinLocal 可能因加速度換算產生非整圈的小數，需 ceil 對齊 spinTime(c)，\\n            // 否則後輪停在非整圈位置，假轉輪帶與真實符號不同步造成瞬切\\n            const relativeMinLocalAligned = Math.ceil( relativeMinLocal / spinTime ) * spinTime;\\n\\n            // 不得低於 StartSpin 原始排程（含 tease extra spins），防止加速時 cascade 吃掉後輪的額外圈數\\n            const newStopLocal = this.ToolsStrip( Math.max(\\n                Math.ceil( minLocalTime / spinTime ) * spinTime,\\n                this.m_reelStopLocalTimeBase[ c ],\\n                relativeMinLocalAligned\\n
